news.headline: King Charles hails US-UK unity in speech to Congress amid Iran tensions
news.summary: Britain’s King Charles told the US Congress on Tuesday ⁠that despite an age of uncertainty and conflict in Europe and the Middle East, the ⁠UK and the US will always be staunch allies united in defending democracy, at a time of deep divisions between the two long-time allies over the war with Iran.

news.headline: Multinational Forces Validate Defensive Readiness During Exercise Balikatan 2026
news.summary: Over 500 service members from the U.S., Philippines, Australia and New Zealand successfully coordinated fires from land and air to defeat a simulated adversary attack during Balikatan 2026, exemplifying the "shoulder-to-shoulder" spirit of the exercise.
